title: Humidification Controls
full_text:
5.2.9.1 Humidification Controls
Humidification Controls
1) If an HVAC system is equipped with a means for adding or removing moisture
to maintain specific humidity levels in a space, an automatic humidity control device
shall be provided.

sentences.text: If an HVAC system is equipped with a means for adding or removing moisture to maintain specific humidity levels in a space, an automatic humidity control device shall be provided.
